data.name: Manas Jungle Safari
data.description: Experience an unforgettable safari in Manas National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage Site renowned for its rich biodiversity and breathtaking landscapes. Spot the rare one-horned rhinoceros, Bengal tiger, wild buffalo, elephants, and exotic birds while exploring lush grasslands and forests. A perfect destination for wildlife lovers, photographers, and nature enthusiasts seeking adventure. Contact us for Jeep Safari and Elephant Safari booking.

comments.text: Manas National Park is Excellent. I did full day and half day Jungle Safari and it was a great life time experience for me. Sulaiman, our Safari guide and Driver was excellent and he took us to core jungle area. I saw Lots of Elephant, Rhino, Water Buffalo, Bison, Dear, Golden langoor, hornbill, Peacock and many more beautiful birds.
Wonderful experience...My best jungle safari experience is manas jungle safari...I have seen lots of animal...Must visit destination...
